string.text: I look forward to. Mind you, the order is urgent, it must perform two days.
I found forty. He was at the station 'Midsummer', under the name Flint. He's already figured out.
Sorted out? Oh, sorry. Even in the throat is not used ... Well, no, it is still good news. Here you go, as promised.
Thank you.
Through the burned-out farmhouse. Hmm ... And you do what?

To tell the truth, to tell - a bit. It is extremely dangerous, and is almost always fatal. He rolled slowly - the easiest to catch him coming to change the weather - but the peak of his passes quickly enough ... At the first signs of its approach to find shelter - a cave or something made of concrete, brick and steel ... I, like some others, I feel it coming - back ache. But the nature of emissions can not say anything - I do not know ...
I want to get out of the zone.
You sure? This is a one-way road.
Sure. Come on.
Although, all right ... While staying.
Capercaillie dead. It looks like he was killed by Tremor ... Once he's dead, too.
[More ...]
[More ...]
Now let's see ... With such health? Well, when I apparently need a ticket to the morgue ...

This place is also called the 'Iron wood'. The helicopter crashed right on the power poles. From the military there were no survivors ... Even if he survived - would not have chosen. Poltergeists, for sure, RE would be herded. You know, these creatures react to any movement.

Listen ... How to helicopter crashed, the military saw there - just five people. It seems to be out of swamps, they successfully got. No, it is not difficult to get there, the main thing - not to go into the water, and jumping over bumps. And protection from chemicals needed. So you, if you want there to climb, buy from a medical antidotes.
I have something extracted from there.
But why then are you silent? .. Well, found something for me?
You need to get information in the camp of mercenaries. Not as difficult as it seems.
Prototypes of detectors. You do not want to buy them back?
Found secret documents on the bridge at the convoy. Want to see?
PDA envoy of Sultan.
Not so interesting. I will give him 500.
Agreed.
A strange artifact. Found on the dredger.
A strange artifact. Found near the station 'Midsummer'.
Artifact 'Heart of the Oasis.'
Need the goods? Information? .. Or maybe you want to sell the information to me?

Oh, sorry you did not find the Joker from the barge, my comrades ... Good to have sat ... Well were like brothers to each other out - Mount ... How so we could get? ... I am here, and they're ... it is not clear where the ...
Tell me about the Joker and Barge.
PDA Barges. I found his body in a cave under the burned village.
I found it near the skeleton not far from the 'Sosnoduba.' This PDA Joker.
Joker? ... It can not be! ... What is this? ... It turns out that the Joker is dead ... Ah, the Joker does not laugh us more ... Rest in peace ... I hope that the barge's all right ...
Joker? ... It can not be! ... What is this? ... Does that mean that the Joker is dead ... Ah, the Joker does not laugh us more ... Rest in peace ... And Barge ... How did it happen ...
Barges and the Joker. One found a short distance from the 'Sosnoduba', the skeleton, the other - on the dead body in the caves under the burned village.
Well, then clear. I know him, he was still a rascal and insolent, I look much lately. Stalkers thinks plant ... We ought to put him in his place.
Yeah I do not care who does what dobazarilsya. Goni all here!
Hey, take it easy ... Here you go.
Okay, hold on.
Do not know? ... We already do not care. Goni all here, simpleton!
Yes, help from you - as with goat milk ... Okay ... You know, you can not reward shine - nothing to give.
It happens.

Hammer! It now remains sympathetic terpily dodavit. I tipped off that beard gave his stalkers cool detectors to rare artifacts often nasharivat. It is necessary to enroll in these stalkers and make the detectors you have fallen on the pocket. Caught?
Figure there. There is no way to influence it. I wanted to pinch his supply chain, so that bearded bastard still got this 'Compass'. Consider it all with velvet ... yet.
What kind of job can you offer?
Profitable. What you clicked? You - a new man, while here - no contacts. And could quickly rise ... Interested in what I have to say about this?
Interested.

Then look here. There are a couple of stalkers Beard thought the currency to rise. Rustling was not planned ... Will you come with all the guys at night to 'Shevchenko', and as long as customers are savvy - take with them provisions. We - the benefits to you, personally - the authority ... Caught? All right. Here is Knuckles, peretresh with him the details.
Not really.
That's for good reason. Do you still think ... As you will understand, that's good for you - let's talk.
Useful to you if you want to climb ... Interested in what I have to say about this?
Sultan said - you want to stalkers shake. I am with you.
Excellent. To heap up 'Shevchenko' midnight - we'll be waiting for you. Current until the morning do not wait.
Better I'll stay with you. Let's wait for midnight - show me the way to the 'Shevchenko'.
No question, you stay. To reduce the barge - no problem.
Although there is not. I'll do as long as their business.
And, bro ... Well, what with the Sultan to dobazarilis?
Mr. Th ... Heap up to the barge after midnight until dawn is not the beginning - we'll wait for you.
Come on.
Wait a minute.
Well, take the money. We will not quarrel.
What? ... All lend the fuck! And get out of here! Quickly!
I'm leaving.
It will not work!
And we cool them voltanuli! Only you, simpleton, aside hesitated because fuck you and do not share. Okay, do not ssy. If you still cares naklyunetsya we mayaknem.
You are going to rob a group of stalkers. I advise you to be alert.
Scum! Do not worry, we will prepare them a warm reception ... Listen, if possible, rub them in confidence. Find out how and what, but help us to fight back ... we will not stay in debt!
Scum! Do not worry, we will prepare them a warm reception ... Look, if there is such a possibility, we fight back. We will not stay in debt!
